agent1 (Round 2 summarized): Taxilin is not recognized as a cancer marker based on extensive retrieval of scientific literature, where it neither appears among listed tumor markers nor shows association with cancer diagnostic studies. Although similar-sounding “taxane” relates to anticancer therapies, taxilin itself lacks empirical basis in oncology. 

\boxed{B}

The summary should end with \boxed{B}.  

Only include one instance of \boxed{B}, at the very end.

Taxilin is not identified as a cancer marker in available medical literature, as it does not appear within any reference discussing tumor indicators or cancer diagnoses. Even though "taxane"—an antineoplastic drug—may cause confusion due to phonetic resemblance, taxilin has no verified role in oncological assessment.  
\boxed{B}. Answer choice: B
